video_info.title: New Zealand Women's Tour of England 2026
video_info.shortDescription: The opening ODI at Chester‑le‑Street kicks off England’s home season, featuring a youthful side led by new captain Charlie Dean returning after a long post‑World Cup break, while a confident New Zealand arrive buoyed by their 2–1 series win over South Africa and Amelia Kerr’s standout form. Who will take the lead? Tune in to catch all the action from the 1st ODI of New Zealand Women's Tour of England 2026, LIVE only on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Bundesliga 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Hamburger SV host Freiburg in a Bundesliga clash, with both sides eager to secure crucial points as the season enters its decisive phase. Freiburg will look to rely on their attacking discipline and consistency, while Hamburg aim to make home advantage count in what promises to be a closely fought encounter.
